---
title: "report"
output: pdf_document
date: "`r Sys.Date()`"
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = FALSE)
```

```{r}
library(tidyverse)
dim(read_csv("mlb_statcast_2026_reduced.csv"))
```
-dataset documentation: <https://baseballsavant.mlb.com/csv-docs>
-mlb_statcast_2026 contains the 22610 pitches from the first week of games.
